collections.name: The Linen Ease Set
collections.short_description: Effortlessly relaxed white linen drawstring trousers paired with a cobalt blue V-neck tee. The perfect minimal set for a man who moves with ease.
description: The Linen Ease Set is built around a pair of wide-leg white linen drawstring trousers — clean, breathable and quietly refined. The waistband features an elasticated back and a double drawstring closure with dual zip pockets at the thigh, giving the trousers a utilitarian edge within a decidedly relaxed silhouette.

Worn here with a cobalt blue V-neck short-sleeve tee, the combination reads effortless. The tee's deep blue grounds the ivory of the linen, producing a contrast that is bold without being loud. This set is built for the man who dresses with intention but values comfort as much as appearance.

The Linen Ease Set — white linen drawstring trousers on mannequin, front close-up view
The Linen Ease Set — white linen drawstring trousers on mannequin
The Linen Ease Set — white linen drawstring trousers flat lay

collections.name: The Midnight Overcoat
collections.short_description: A commanding black wool long overcoat concealing a sweeping blue paisley interior lining. Power on the outside. Drama within.
description: The Midnight Overcoat is a study in restrained drama. Cut in a long single-breasted silhouette from a structured black wool blend, the coat presents a clean, authoritative exterior — two-button closure, peak lapels, twin flap pockets and a polished notch at the chest. Nothing is unnecessary.

Open it, and an entirely different story unfolds: a rich, full blue and grey paisley lining cascades down the interior — an intimate detail reserved for the wearer. Styled over a cream crew-neck knit and paired with warm brown wool trousers, this coat signals presence before a word is spoken.

gallery.alt: The Midnight Overcoat — full mannequin view, coat worn open over cream knit and brown trousers
The Midnight Overcoat — flat lay open, blue paisley lining fully visible

collections.name: The Stone Glen Suit
collections.short_description: A taupe Glen plaid double-breasted suit with dramatic boot-cut flare trousers. Impeccably structured. Confidently retro.
description: The Stone Glen Suit is a masterpiece of pattern and proportion. Crafted from a warm stone-taupe Glen plaid wool blend, the double-breasted jacket features wide peak lapels, a breast pocket square, twin flap pockets, and four-button cuffs — every detail deliberate and precise. The result is a silhouette that commands a room without demanding attention.

The suit's defining statement is its boot-cut flare trousers, which echo the plaid from waistband to hem in perfect harmony. This is not a suit that whispers — it is architectural menswear that nods to 1970s power dressing while remaining entirely contemporary in its execution.

gallery.alt: The Stone Glen Suit — full mannequin, double-breasted jacket with matching flare trousers
The Stone Glen Suit — full mannequin alternate view showing complete ensemble
The Stone Glen Suit — jacket close-up on mannequin, lapels and pocket detail
The Stone Glen Suit — flare trousers close-up on mannequin, showing boot-cut hem

collections.name: The Powder Blue Brocade Suit
collections.short_description: A baby blue double-breasted suit woven in textured jacquard brocade with black piping. Quiet extravagance for the moments that matter.
description: The Powder Blue Brocade Suit is constructed from a premium jacquard brocade in powder blue — a fabric whose surface tells its own story through raised abstract texture that shifts with the light. The double-breasted jacket is cut with a sharp peak lapel, accented by fine black piping along the lapel edge, and finished with covered brocade buttons that disappear into the fabric.

The matching slim-cut trousers carry the same jacquard weave from hip to ankle, creating a seamless, head-to-toe statement. Paired with a white dress shirt and a tone-on-tone blue tie, this suit transforms any evening occasion into a personal gallery of craftsmanship.

gallery.alt: The Powder Blue Brocade Suit — full mannequin, complete suit with white shirt and blue tie
The Powder Blue Brocade Suit — jacket close-up showing brocade texture and black piping lapels
The Powder Blue Brocade Suit — trousers flat lay showing jacquard brocade detail

collections.name: The Terracotta Pinstripe Ensemble
collections.short_description: A rust-terracotta pinstripe sleeveless belted vest worn over a white dress shirt with matching cuffed trousers. Structured, bold, and entirely intentional.
description: The Terracotta Pinstripe Ensemble centres around a sleeveless double-lapel vest in a rich rust-terracotta tone running with fine ivory pinstripes. The vest fastens at the waist with a silver rectangular buckle belt, and features oversized pleated patch pockets at the hips — a design that reads both utilitarian and luxurious simultaneously.

The vest is designed to be worn over a crisp white dress shirt, with the matching cuffed pinstripe trousers completing the set below. The terracotta colourway is warm and distinctly warm-season, while the precision of the pinstripe and structured cut ensure this ensemble reads as sharp as any formal suit.

attributes.Silhouette: Sleeveless belted vest, straight-leg cuffed trousers

collections.name: The Gingham Statement Blazer
collections.short_description: A bold black and white gingham check single-button blazer. Pattern-forward, sharp, and styled to be noticed.
description: The Gingham Statement Blazer makes its argument the moment it enters a room. Cut from a high-contrast black and white medium-scale gingham check, the single-button notch lapel blazer is slim and deliberate — patch pockets at the hips, a breast welt pocket, and a clean dark lining that grounds the loud exterior.

It is shown here styled over a black fitted tee and black wide-leg flare trousers, letting the blazer carry the full visual weight of the look. The contrast between the bold check and the all-black base creates a statement that is cool without trying too hard. This blazer is the piece a man reaches for when he wants the room to know he has taste.

gallery.alt: The Gingham Statement Blazer — full mannequin, blazer over black tee and black flare trousers
The Gingham Statement Blazer — flat lay on concrete surface, lining visible
The Gingham Statement Blazer — hanging on rail, full front view

collections.name: The Navy Pinstripe Suit
collections.short_description: A classic navy chalk-stripe single-breasted suit with a silver satin lining and three-button flap pockets. Authority, tailored.
description: The Navy Pinstripe Suit is a cornerstone of serious menswear. Built from a deep navy blue suiting fabric carrying fine chalk-white pinstripes, the single-breasted jacket is structured and confident — a peak lapel, three large flap-and-button pockets, and a silver satin lining bearing a branded repeat print within. It is a suit that does not need to announce itself.

The matching straight-leg trousers carry the same pinstripe from waistband to cuffed hem, maintaining the vertical discipline of the design throughout. Shown paired with a white dress shirt and a deep burgundy tie, this suit belongs in boardrooms, at ceremonies, and at every occasion where presence matters.

attributes.Fabrics: Pinstripe suiting wool blend, silver satin lining
attributes.Colors: Navy Blue, White chalk pinstripe, Silver lining
attributes.Silhouette: Single-breasted peak lapel jacket, straight-leg trousers

collections.name: The Abstract Bloom Blazer
collections.short_description: A single-breasted blazer erupting in multicolour abstract floral and firework print across a dark navy base. Wearable art.
description: The Abstract Bloom Blazer is not a background piece — it is the centrepiece of any room it enters. The dark navy base is consumed by an explosive hand-painted-style print: bursting fireworks, layered concentric circles, sweeping curves in crimson, sky blue, burnt orange, cream, and gold. No two panels of the fabric read the same.

Cut in a single-button, notch-lapel silhouette with twin flap pockets, the blazer is paired here with a black crew-neck tee and clean cream trousers — letting the print carry the full energy of the look. This is the piece for a man who understands that clothing can be art, and who is not afraid to wear it.

attributes.Colors: Navy, Red, Orange, Sky Blue, Gold, Cream
attributes.Occasion: Evening out, Events, Art openings, Celebrations

gallery.alt: The Abstract Bloom Blazer — full mannequin, blazer over black tee and cream trousers
The Abstract Bloom Blazer — flat lay showing full multicolour abstract print

collections.name: The Teal Tribe Set
collections.short_description: A teal and black African-inspired print short-sleeve shirt, paired with black crystal-embellished wide-leg drawstring trousers. Cultural energy. Contemporary edge.
description: The Teal Tribe Set opens with one of the most visually striking pieces in the collection: a short-sleeve shirt built from a dual-zone African-inspired print. The upper half carries bold cracked-mosaic geometric shapes in vivid teal on a black ground; the lower half transitions to a field of teal concentric rings and tribal arrow motifs. The collar is finished with a black and white micro-check inner lining — a quiet detail that rewards a close look.

Below, a pair of wide-leg black drawstring trousers in a heavyweight jersey fabric are scattered with tiny crystal embellishments that catch the light as the wearer moves — subtle sparkle against a matte ground. Together, the shirt and trousers form a complete look: high energy, culturally rooted, and polished enough for any occasion from a dinner to a cultural event.

attributes.Silhouette: Short-sleeve regular-fit shirt, wide-leg drawstring trousers
attributes.Fit: Regular fit shirt, relaxed wide-leg trousers

collections.name: The Highland Flannel Set
collections.short_description: A rich burgundy, cream and grey plaid western flannel shirt with snap buttons and dual chest pockets, paired with clean cream linen trousers.
description: The Highland Flannel Set is grounded in the kind of effortless, unhurried confidence that only comes from clothes that are simply well-made. The long-sleeve flannel shirt is built from a large-scale tartan plaid in burgundy, cream and warm grey — worn soft against the skin, with a western yoke at the chest, dual snap-fastened breast pockets, and mother-of-pearl snap buttons running the full placket.

It is paired with a pair of clean, slim-cut cream linen trousers — cuffed at the hem, fastened with a single button — that draw no attention to themselves but make everything above them look better. This is the set for a relaxed afternoon, a low-key event, or any occasion where looking good is effortless and intentional.

attributes.Colors: Burgundy / Cream / Grey plaid (shirt), Natural Cream (trousers)
attributes.Silhouette: Western long-sleeve shirt, slim cuffed trousers
attributes.Fit: Regular fit shirt, slim straight trousers
